subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-02-24
subcodes.first_line: When Aqa Abdu'r-Rahim came to Baghdad he was a young man with a heavy black moustache. He has grown old in this Cause.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @stories; anecdotes, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
